title: Minimal Digital Product Passport Structural Schema
description: Prototype/reference only, not an official DPP production schema. Validates the basic structural requirements of a Digital Product Passport JSON-LD object. Used by the Product Passport Bridge v0.12.0 Schema Validator workflow for structural testing.
_prototype_note: Prototype/reference only, not an official DPP production schema. Does not claim GS1 or EU DPP regulatory compliance.

@type.description: JSON-LD type declaration. Must be present.

gs1:productName.description: Optional product name (string or language-tagged array).
